titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 165: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 165. (A.R. No. 312 of 1910.) TIRUMEYJÑĀNAM, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Jñānaparamēśvara temple.

p.hi: Year 15, Siṁha, Monday, Kārttigai: 985 A.D. August 10.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged and portion at the end is lost. It records that the peruṅguṟipperumakkaḷ inclusive of the priests (nambi) of the mahāsabhā of Nālūr, a brahmadēyam in Śeṟṟūr-kūṟṟam assembled at the courtyard of Śaparēśvaram and sold a plot of land, tax-free, to the god, Chandraśēkhara-perumāḷ at Tirumiyānam as tiruvamirdhuppuṟam (for providing food offerings) after taking kāśu from the god ie temple. The land is stated to have lapsed to the above sabhā on account of the nonpayment of land tax (iṟai) due on the land by (the original owners), Māḍilaṉ Pāṇḍaṉdataṉ and his brother Kaḍambaṉ Pāṇḍaṉ and his (other) brother and the sabhā had been consequently remitting the taxes to many kings for many years.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 370.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecariparmmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5 patiṉaiñcāvatu ceṟṟūrk kūṟṟat
tu brahmateyam nālūr nampiyyāruḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟip perumakka
ḷom Ivvāṇṭu ciṅkanāyaṟṟut tiṅkaḷkkiḻamaip peṟṟa kārttikaiy nāṉṟu Ivvūr śampareśvarattu catti
muṟṟattey kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟṟukkūṭiyiruntu paṇippaṇiyāṟ paṇittu Ivvūrt tirumiyāṉattuc cantiracekara
perumāḷiṭai kācukoṇṭu Ittevarkkut tiruvamirtuppuṟamākac cantirātittaval Iṟaiyiliyākap paṇippaṇiyāl paṇit
tuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr māṭilaṉ pāṇṭaṉ ṟattaṉum tampimāruṅ kaṭampaṉ paṇṭaṉum tampiyuṅ taṅkaḷ nilattu Iṟai Iṟāta
māka Innilattukkup palyāṇṭum sabhaiyomey Iṟai Iṟuttu sabhainokkip pala rā[jā]kkaḷukku Iṟai Iṟuttup pon
ta nilam Ivvūr vaṭaceri meṭu pārttiyuñ ceṟuvu pārttiyumāṉa pārttic cantiracekarap perumāḷukku nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyiliyākak
koṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilattukkellai Ūraṟin=ta na kellaiyiṉu kku
kiḻpārkellai tirukka śvarattup perumāḷ ṉilattukku meṟkum
lai māṭilaṉ catti civa paṭṭālaka nilattukkuṅ kiṭaṅka
lpāṟkellai tirunā tiru ttap perumāṇilattukku
ṟkellai sabhaiyo nilattukkut tiruccittirakūṭattup perumā ttukkut
kum Ivvicaitta nāṉkellaiyilumakappaṭṭa pārtti karut mā
ṭiya pārttiyuṅ ki ṉāl vanta pārtti Āyirattirunūṟṟu pārtti 2m 2mukkāl
śamum Uḷḷaṭaṅka Ita y puḻutikkāvum t teṟkil kiṭaṅkuc ca
tiṉukku meṟkkaṭainta I kkup puḻutikkāvu kiṭaṅkupārtti Itaṉiṭa
kiṇaṟum Uḷpaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koṇṭa kamu ta raṇa
m meṭu pārtti viṟṟu ttom cantirace ḷḷiṭṭa peru
teṟkku perumakkaḷom I ttu vaṭakkil niyā tu muḻamaka
nila kkel nirpāykiṉIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 165 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
